text: I find myself amidst an environment of curiosity and learning. In the first scene, I observe a classroom or workshop through a glass wall—people are focused, intent on their screens, debating and discussing. I feel slightly detached yet intrigued, on the fringe of something important and intellectual. In the second scene, I am drawn to a vividly colored exhibition wall dedicated to R+D—Research and Development. The creative display, the clever design, and the presence of thought-provoking text make me feel inspired and reflective. Here, I am reminded that knowledge is constructed collectively, and innovation thrives at the intersection of art, design, and technology. Being present among both the thinkers and the makers, I sense the energy of progress and possibility.
